== Notes for [[Item:Q57817|Q57817]] ==

=== GEDCOM Note ===
Don Juan (Joao) 'Abraham' Solomon Coronel (Senior Coronel) Dutch: Juan Joao Solomon David Abraham Perez Coronel

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADB3EEBF1EFBBFA9822EF79916C3EB5
geni:6000000004988963154

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
